body.title: Fix runtime path references after .TheIgors reorganization
body.result: paths.py updated: logs→local/logs, milieu→instance/, word_graph→instance/. Three hardcoded bypasses fixed (memory_sync, misfire_counter, slow_query). Runtime files moved with Igor down: milieu_global.json and word_graph.db (4.6GB) to Igor-wild-0001/, active logs from ~/.TheIgors/logs/ to local/logs/. Commit 0a262f5f.
body.description: ~/.TheIgors root reorganized: local/ = machine-global, Igor-wild-0001/ = swarm home. Code still writes to old paths. Fix: (1) milieu_global.json writer → Igor-wild-0001/milieu_global.json; (2) logs/ writer → local/logs/; (3) word_graph.db path → Igor-wild-0001/word_graph.db (then move the 4.6GB file); (4) any other code using ~/.TheIgors/<file> directly instead of paths() calls. After fixes: root should have only cc_channel symlink, Igor-wild-0001/, local/, word_graph.db (until moved).
